zh.lifeSummary: 當Euphemia de Wemyss於1411年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯時，她的父親David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss17歲，母親Christian Douglas17歲。她於1428年11月19日與William Livingstone of Salcoats在蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾德盧姆利享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Euphemia de Wemyss于1411年出生在英国苏格兰費伏維梅斯时，她的父亲David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss17岁，母亲Christian Douglas17岁。她于1428年11月19日与William Livingstone of Salcoats在苏格兰費伏維梅斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年在苏格兰登巴頓史爾德盧姆利享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wemyss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Wemyss in Fife, traditionally pronounced ‘weems’. The placename is from Gaelic uaimh ‘cave’ + the placename forming suffix –es. The surname reached Ireland in the 14th century, see Wims .

variants.name: Wims
meanings: Irish: variant of Scottish   Wemyss  , representing the usual pronunciation of that Scottish name.

variants.name: Weems
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Wemyss  , reflecting the usual pronunciation of that name.

History: David Weems (Wemyss) emigrated from Scotland to Herring Bay, Anne Arundel County, MD, some time before 1722. Mason Locke Weems, born near Herring Bay in 1759, was a clergyman who wrote a biography of George Washington, in which the first account of the cherry-tree story appeared.

variants.name: Wymbs
meanings: Irish: variant of Scottish   Wemyss  . Compare   Wims  .

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

en.lifeSummary: When Euphemia de Wemyss was born in 1411, in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss, was 17 and her mother, Christian Douglas, was 17. She married William Livingstone of Salcoats on 19 November 1428, in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1470, in Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Euphemia de Wemyss est née en 1411, à Wemyss, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Christian Douglas, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William Livingstone of Salcoats le 19 novembre 1428, à Wemyss, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Euphemia de Wemyss 1411 in Wemyss, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss 17 und ihre Mutter Christian Douglas 17. Sie hat am 19. November 1428 in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland William Livingstone of Salcoats geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Euphemia de Wemyss è nata il nel 1411 nel Wemyss, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Christian Douglas, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato William Livingstone of Salcoats il 19 novembre 1428, nel Wemyss, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1470, nel Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Euphemia de Wemyssが1411年にイギリススコットランドフィフウエムイスで生まれた時，父David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyssは17歳，母Christian Douglasは17歳であった。1428年11月19日にスコットランドフィフウエムイスでWilliam Livingstone of Salcoatsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアドルムリーで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Euphemia de Wemyss(이)가 1411년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 w미스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Douglas(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1428년 11월 19일 스컷랜드 피프 w미스에서 William Livingstone of Salcoats(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 드럼리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Euphemia de Wemyss nasceu em 1411, em Wemyss, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Christian Douglas, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com William Livingstone of Salcoats em 19 de novembro de 1428, em Wemyss, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1470, em Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Euphemia de Wemyss родилась в 1411 г. в местности вемисс, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Douglas, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Livingstone of Salcoats 19 ноября 1428 г. в местности вемисс, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1470 г. в местности друмри, дунбартоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Euphemia de Wemyss nació en 1411, en Wemyss, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, David Wemyss of Kincaldrum, of Methil and Wemyss, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Christian Douglas, tenía 17 años. Se casó con William Livingstone of Salcoats el 19 de noviembre de 1428, en Wemyss, Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1470, en Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 59 años.
